author: chip
body:
And while you’re at it, swing by AtomicNed.com where you can hear an interview I conducted with Alex last night, just hours before the world heard One Last Century for the first time.

[http://atomicned.com/?p=293](http://atomicned.com/?p=293)

author: Burgo
body:
Hey Chip,  
Thanks for stopping by! Is there any way for my readers to stream the mp3 rather than download it? Just worried that a 40 minute interview might be a bit daunting for some people to download on poor net connections?

author: chip
body: Let me look into the streaming option.

author: Burgo
body: Thanks mate, let us know if you come up with a solution :)

author: Pete
body: Have you thought about posting the album on jamendo.com? Jamendo is a music distribution service that allows listeners and artists to post and download music for free. The site currently has about 10000 hits a day. Maybe the band wants to look into it…..

author: Sergey
body: Please anybody give me a link.
